passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Name's <funky><color=#26F7FD>Johnny!</color></funky> But the babes.
[[Johnny2]]
passages.name: Johnny

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> <sketchy>Of course!</sketchy>
[[Johnny11]]
passages.name: Johnny10

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I'd love to learn about <color=orange>THE HUMAN <shake>EXPERIENCE!</shake></color>
[[Johnny12]]
passages.name: Johnny11

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I wonder why <color=orange>humans</color> loooove ice cream.
[[Johnny13]]
passages.name: Johnny12

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I wonder why humans breed dogs to be weaker and stupider.
[[Johnny14]]
passages.name: Johnny13

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> In fact, I really wonder where <sketchy>babies come from.</sketchy>
[[You4]]
passages.name: Johnny14

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I'm down for any recommendations ya got!
[[Johnny16]]
passages.name: Johnny15

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Though honestly-- to keep it lowkey.
[[Johnny17]]
passages.name: Johnny16

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I really want something that could make me feel <color=red><wave>LIKE A BADASS!</wave></color>
[[Johnny18]]
passages.name: Johnny17

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Like I read a passage and I just want to <shake>TEAR DOWN A WALL</shake> from <shake>heartpounding</shake> adrenaline! 
[[Johnny19]]
passages.name: Johnny18

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Flowery prose is a bonus. I've been challenging myself as a reader after all.
[[You5]]
passages.name: Johnny19

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> ...
[[Johnny3]]
passages.name: Johnny2

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> <color=red><shake> . . .</shake></color>
[[Johnny4]]
passages.name: Johnny3

passages.text:
<color=red>John:</color> They... call me <size=50%><shake>John.</shake></size>
[[You]]
passages.name: Johnny4

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Presley's the last name. I had it <wave>legally changed!</wave>
[[Johnny6]]
passages.name: Johnny5

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Human law suggests I can only change my first name. But now . <color=yellow><wave>Yeeeeee-hawwwww!!</wave></color>
[[Johnny7]]
passages.name: Johnny6

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> ...
[[Johnny8]]
passages.name: Johnny7

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> Sorry, that was <size=50%>probably offensive</size>. I'm sure ya missed being around other <color=orange>humans</color>. 
[[Johnny9]]
passages.name: Johnny8

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>Johnny:</color> I hope I didn't bum you out too badly <shake>bahahaha</shake>!
[[You2]]
passages.name: Johnny9

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color><size=50%> (There is no way...)</size>
[[ZanyCharacter10]]
passages.name: NoWay

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> I was honestly thinking Elvis.

[[Johnny5]]
passages.name: You

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Nah, it's totally chill man. I love seeing anyone learn more about human history.
[[You3]]
passages.name: You2

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> You wanna check out a <sketchy>book</sketchy> right?
[[Johnny10]]
passages.name: You3

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color>  How... <size=50%>ambitious.</size>

[[Johnny15]]
passages.name: You4

passages.text: <color=yellow>You:</color> (I'm thinking of getting Johnny a book that is both science fiction and fantasy. He should be happy with that)
passages.name: You5

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Hey boss! Things hangin' all good?
[[ZanyCharacter2]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Look, it's a memento. It's important to me.
[[ZanyCharacter11]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter10

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> I can hide it a bit if it lets you sleep at night better. I can't make that many accomodations though. Sorry! 
[[ZanyCharacter12]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter11

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> If there's anything else I can help you with I can assist.
[[ZanyCharacter13]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter12

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> You're clearly a <wave>human</wave> though right!? I can see through the mask. Ya ain't foolin' anyone!
[[ZanyCharacter14]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter13

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Bahaha! So <wave>sentimental!</wave>
[[ZanyCharacter15]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter14

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> I really <wave><color=yellow>dig</color></wave> it though! I don't think I know a single other human! 
[[Johnny]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter15

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Y... yea?
[[ZanyCharacter3]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter2

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> Can you do me a favor? You know the <wave>coffee machine</wave> right?
[[ZanyCharacter4]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter3

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> The coffee machine at the back? I swore I got that fixed.
[[ZanyCharacter5]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter4

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> Is it out of coffee pods or something?
[[ZanyCharacter6]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter5

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> No no no! It's just...
[[ZanyCharacter7]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter6

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color><wave>...</wave>
[[ZanyCharacter8]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter7

passages.text:
<color=#26F7FD>???:</color> It just makes me <shake><color=red>uncomfortable</color></shake> that's all.
[[ZanyCharacter9]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter8

passages.text:
<color=yellow>You:</color> ...
[[NoWay]]
passages.name: ZanyCharacter9
